typography.installation: Add Google fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono

spacing_and_layout.general: High-density data architecture. Dense paddings in tables, ample whitespace in page headers.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px to 4px max) for a sharp, technical look.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen border-r border-border bg-surface
spacing_and_layout.tables: Dense layout: px-3 py-2 cells. Sticky header. Horizontal scroll for large datasets. Hover row states. Avoid pagination if virtualized, else simple previous/next.

components.buttons: Flat, no shadow. rounded-sm. Explicit hover states. focus-visible:ring-2.
components.cards: bg-background border border-border rounded-sm shadow-none. Hover: shadow-sm.
components.inputs: bg-background border border-border rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-colors.
components.kpi_cards: Use 'Control Room' style. Grid layout. Metric text-3xl font-mono. Include small sparkline (recharts) aligned right. Status indicator (green arrow up, red arrow down).
components.campaign_wizard: Horizontal step indicator with strict validation per step. Step 1: Audience, Step 2: Channel, Step 3: Template, Step 4: Schedule, Step 5: Review.
components.timeline_ui: Vertical border-l-2 border-border. Each event is a dot colored by channel. Flex column for message content. Click-to-call icon adjacent to Voice events.
components.chat_bubbles: SMS: Gray/Blue combo. WA: Standard light green. RCS: Orange/White. Use text-sm, rounded-md with tail.
components.icons: lucide-react. Use stroke-width: 1.5 or 2 for clarity at small sizes.

login_bg_light.description: Light mode login background. Abstract Swiss geometric.

login_bg_dark.description: Dark mode login background. Deep obsidian abstract.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, dialog triggers, table rows, menu items) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case specifying their role. E.g. data-testid='create-campaign-button', data-testid='contact-row-123'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts where Shadcn is too rigid, but use Shadcn extensively for Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Tabs.
Install Google Fonts in index.css using @import.
Strictly follow the color tokens. Avoid generic purple or teal gradients.
For tables, implement column filters and a top bar for bulk actions (e.g. Export, Delete).
Use Recharts for the analytics charts. Ensure lines/bars use the 'primary' or 'channel_colors' hex codes for consistency.
Implement the 'Control Room' bento grid for the Dashboard overview.
Ensure the Sidebar collapses or stays hidden on mobile (use Shadcn Sheet for mobile nav).
